text:
屈強な龍族が住む火山洞窟の奥地で
ダーカーの侵食で正気を失った
龍族ヒ・ロガがいた。
龍族の青年ヒ・エンの声も届かない。
それを見たアキは、ヒ・エンに告げる。
アークスに任せてほしい、と。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

屈強な龍族が住む火山洞窟の奥地で、ダーカーの
侵食で正気を失った龍族ヒ・ロガがいた。龍族の
青年ヒ・エンの声も届かない。それを見たアキは
ヒ・エンに告げる。アークスに任せてほしい、と。

In the depths of the Volcanic Caves, where the
stalwart Draconians dwell, there lives the
Draconian Hi'Roga, who has lost his senses due
to the pernicious effects of Falspawn corruption.
The Draconian youth, Hi'En, has failed to make
headway with his elder and Aki has pledged that
ARKS will offer whatever assistance it can to help.
-------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become
incapacitated or retire.

Deep in the Volcanic Caves, lives the Draconian Hi'Roga, who
has lost his senses due to the effects of Falspawn corruption.
The Draconian youth, Hi'En, failed to reach his elder and Aki has
pledged that ARKS will offer whatever assistance it can to help.
惑星アムドゥスキア　火山洞窟
